item.description: Fans packed Mexico City as the largest World Cup ever got underway, with Mexico defeating South Africa in the tournament's opening match. NBC News’ Stephanie Gosk reports.

media:content.media:title: Mexico opens historic World Cup with a win
media:content.media:description: Fans packed Mexico City as the largest World Cup ever got underway, with Mexico defeating South Africa in the tournament's opening match. NBC News’ Stephanie Gosk reports.

item.title: Mexico opens historic World Cup with a win

item.description: As the World Cup kicks off, some die-hard soccer supporters are sharing their unique fan traditions. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

media:content.media:title: Die-hard soccer fans share their unique traditions as the World Cup kicks off
media:content.media:description: As the World Cup kicks off, some die-hard soccer supporters are sharing their unique fan traditions. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

item.title: Die-hard soccer fans share their unique traditions as the World Cup kicks off

item.description: Jugadores y cuerpo técnico arribaron en Guadalajara, donde enfrentará a República Checa en su primer partido de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Así llegó Corea del Sur a Guadalajara para su debut ante República Checa!
media:content.media:description: Jugadores y cuerpo técnico arribaron en Guadalajara, donde enfrentará a República Checa en su primer partido de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: ¡Así llegó Corea del Sur a Guadalajara para su debut ante República Checa!

item.description: Los analistas destacan la sólida actuación de México en el Estadio Azteca, el gol de Raúl Jiménez, la propuesta de Javier Aguirre y la expulsión de César Montes en el triunfo 2-0 sobre Sudáfrica.

media:content.media:title: El Tri aprobó su primer examen: análisis del triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica
media:content.media:description: Los analistas destacan la sólida actuación de México en el Estadio Azteca, el gol de Raúl Jiménez, la propuesta de Javier Aguirre y la expulsión de César Montes en el triunfo 2-0 sobre Sudáfrica.

item.title: El Tri aprobó su primer examen: análisis del triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica

item.description: Durante la rueda de prensa previa al debut de la Selección de Estados Unidos, el entrenador Mauricio Pochettino habló sobre el momento de Chris Richards, recuperado, y exaltó que sus jugadores están listos física y mentalmente para el inicio del Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Pochettino rescata la fortaleza mental de la Selección de Estados Unidos para afrontar el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Durante la rueda de prensa previa al debut de la Selección de Estados Unidos, el entrenador Mauricio Pochettino habló sobre el momento de Chris Richards, recuperado, y exaltó que sus jugadores están listos física y mentalmente para el inicio del Mundial.

item.title: Pochettino rescata la fortaleza mental de la Selección de Estados Unidos para afrontar el Mundial

item.description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

media:content.media:title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica
media:content.media:description: Fue una gran exhibición en un ambiente de fiesta en el Estadio Azteca para dar arranque a esta Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. El equipo de Javier Aguirre se llevó tres puntos importantes.

item.title: Raúl Jiménez y Quiñones impulsan el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica

item.description: El ‘Piojo’ fue clave en el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica, con un centro para Jiménez para sellar el 2-0. Al terminar el encuentro platicó con nosotros en Enlace Mundial y nos compartió todas sus sensaciones.

media:content.media:title: Roberto Alvarado habla sobre su asistencia para Raúl Jiménez y la victoria de México
media:content.media:description: El ‘Piojo’ fue clave en el triunfo de México ante Sudáfrica, con un centro para Jiménez para sellar el 2-0. Al terminar el encuentro platicó con nosotros en Enlace Mundial y nos compartió todas sus sensaciones.

item.title: Roberto Alvarado habla sobre su asistencia para Raúl Jiménez y la victoria de México

item.description: El mediocampista fue clave en el primer gol de la Selección Mexicana en su primer partido de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, en donde el ‘Tricolor’ se impuso 2-0 a Sudáfrica. Al terminar el partido, compartió su emoción y objetivos en el magno evento.

media:content.media:title: “Vamos a hacer el mejor Mundial en la historia de nuestro país”: Erik Lira tras debut de México
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista fue clave en el primer gol de la Selección Mexicana en su primer partido de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, en donde el ‘Tricolor’ se impuso 2-0 a Sudáfrica. Al terminar el partido, compartió su emoción y objetivos en el magno evento.

item.title: “Vamos a hacer el mejor Mundial en la historia de nuestro país”: Erik Lira tras debut de México

item.description: El defensor mexicano habla con los medios y resalta el buen resultado de la Selección Mexicana; además, se sincera al revelar su sentir al iniciar el juego, siendo su primer partido de la Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Israel Reyes: "Era importante demostrar de qué estamos hechos"
media:content.media:description: El defensor mexicano habla con los medios y resalta el buen resultado de la Selección Mexicana; además, se sincera al revelar su sentir al iniciar el juego, siendo su primer partido de la Copa Mundial.

item.title: Israel Reyes: "Era importante demostrar de qué estamos hechos"

item.description: El delantero mexicano comparte la emoción de anotar el primer gol de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el primero de su cuenta en una Copa del Mundo. Además, recuerda su celebración con sus compañeros y destaca la unión del grupo.

media:content.media:title: Julián Quiñones reacciona a su primer gol mundialista y al triunfo de México
media:content.media:description: El delantero mexicano comparte la emoción de anotar el primer gol de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026, el primero de su cuenta en una Copa del Mundo. Además, recuerda su celebración con sus compañeros y destaca la unión del grupo.

item.title: Julián Quiñones reacciona a su primer gol mundialista y al triunfo de México

item.description: El entrenador de la selección sudafricana destacó las llegadas que sus jugadores pudieron generar y lamentó las expulsiones y la presión sentida ante el anfitrión en el juego inaugural del Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Dos rojas y mucho por trabajar, la conclusión del entrenador de Sudáfrica ante la derrota con México
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de la selección sudafricana destacó las llegadas que sus jugadores pudieron generar y lamentó las expulsiones y la presión sentida ante el anfitrión en el juego inaugural del Mundial.

item.title: Dos rojas y mucho por trabajar, la conclusión del entrenador de Sudáfrica ante la derrota con México

item.description: Así se vivió la emoción desde las gradas del Estadio Azteca de Ciudad de México, en el primer partido del Mundial 2026 entre México y Sudáfrica. Donde el conjunto mexicano se impuso por dos goles a cero.

media:content.media:title: Así vivieron los aficionados mexicanos el debut mundialista en el Azteca
media:content.media:description: Así se vivió la emoción desde las gradas del Estadio Azteca de Ciudad de México, en el primer partido del Mundial 2026 entre México y Sudáfrica. Donde el conjunto mexicano se impuso por dos goles a cero.

item.title: Así vivieron los aficionados mexicanos el debut mundialista en el Azteca

item.description: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days
media:content.media:description: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

item.title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: The island less than 20 miles off Iran accounts for more than 90% of the country's oil exports.

media:content.media:text: Satellite Imagery Of Kharg Island In Iran
media:content.media:description: Satellite view of Kharg Island in the Persian Gulf off the coast of Iran.

media:content.media:text: IRAN-ECONOMY-OIL-KHARK
media:content.media:description: An oil facility on Kharg Island in 2017.

media:content.media:text: Pipes leading downhill toward the Kharg Island jetty in Iran from the 17 million-barrel-capacity tank farm in 1971.
media:content.media:description: Pipes leading downhill toward the Kharg Island jetty in Iran from the 17 million-barrel-capacity tank farm in 1971.

media:content.media:text: USS Tripoli (LHA-7) amphibious assault enters the Singapore Strait
media:content.media:description: The USS Tripoli amphibious assault ship enters the Singapore Strait amid the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran as seen from Singapore on March 17.

item.title: Why Trump’s eyes are on Iran’s Kharg Island — and why that's a risk

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
Abigail Brooks
item.description: The Supreme Court late Thursday denied Alabama’s request to execute a man using nitrogen gas after two lower court rulings blocked the method and found it violates the constitutional ban on cruel and unusual punishment

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Jimmy Ellis
media:content.media:description: Jimmy Ellis owned Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Elaine Thompson was shot and killed in Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala., in 1998.
media:content.media:description: Elaine Thompson worked at Jimmy's Pawn Shop.

item.title: Supreme Court denies Alabama’s attempt to execute Jeffery Lee by nitrogen gas

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Brennan Leach
Frank Thorp V
Kyle Stewart
item.description: FISA Section 702, a warrantless surveillance tool, is set to lapse as Congress fights with President Donald Trump about Bill Pulte, the acting Director of National Intelligence.

media:content.media:text: U.S. Capitol Building Exterior
media:content.media:description: Congress is heading out of town, having not renewed FISA Section 702 on time for the first time in its history.

item.title: FISA spying power scheduled to expire as House fails to extend it before leaving town

item.dc:creator: Evan Bush
item.description: Prepare for heat, drought and flooding — it’s officially El Niño season, according to the National Weather Service. This one could be on par with some of the strongest.

media:content.media:text: Extreme heat warning in New York
media:content.media:description: People walk along the Brooklyn Bridge during an extreme heat warning in New York in July 2025.

item.title: El Niño is officially here, and this one could be a doozy

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
Allie Canal
item.description: The company controlled by Elon Musk will begin trading Friday at a valuation of $1.77 trillion.

media:content.media:text: SpaceX facilities.
media:content.media:description: SpaceX facilities in Hawthorne, Calif., on April 13, 2026.

item.title: SpaceX locks in IPO price of $135, making it largest stock debut ever

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: The UFC matches to be held on the lawn of the White House on President Donald Trump’s 80th birthday are sure to be a spectacle unseen in the history of the storied complex

media:content.media:text: Hooverball Game on White House Lawn in 1933.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: The UFC arena on the South Lawn of the White House during a media preview on Thursday, June 11, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: President Gerald Ford, Chief of Staff Donald Rumsfeld, and David Kennerly, Personal Photographer to the President, following a Tennis Match on the White House Tennis Courts in 1975.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: President Barack Obama shoots hoops on the White House Basketball Court during a break between meetings, May 7, 2010.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: President Bush and John Denver pitch horseshoes in 1989.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: Truman and Vets Bowling
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: President Richard Nixon Bowling in the White House Bowling Alley in 1971.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

media:content.media:text: Calvin Coolidge's mechanical horse.
media:content.media:description: A Hoover-ball game on White House lawn in 1933.

item.title: Trump’s UFC matches are unprecedented, but sports at the White House aren’t

item.dc:creator: Nicole Acevedo
item.description: Local businesses have taken a hit as families and workers grapple with the effects of the raid last June on the Glenn Valley Foods meatpacking plant, community members said.

media:content.media:text: The Glenn Valley Foods facility Omaha, Neb., on June 13, 2025.
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: Roger Garcia speaks at a podium outside, facing away from the street, some people sit behind him
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: South Omaha’s business district, known as a vibrant Hispanic enclave, is still feeling the impacts of last year's immigration raid, officials and business owners say.
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: Luis Mejia speaks into a microphone being held in front of him
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: A diverse crowd of mostly Omaha residents protested workplace immigration raids in June 2025.
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: Meatpacking employees at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha in June 2025.
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

media:content.media:text: Demonstrators in Omaha after immigration raids in June 2025.
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration authorities arrested 76 people working at Glenn Valley Foods in Omaha, Neb., in June 2025.

item.title: A Nebraska immigration raid shut businesses down a year ago. The fallout is ongoing, officials say.

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Andrew Blankstein
item.description: Golf legend Phil Mickelson is no longer a member of his longtime Southern California club after alleged inappropriate behavior with a staff member, according to a report from Golf Digest

media:content.media:text: Phil Mickelson standing on a golf course wearing sunglasses against a blurred background.
media:content.media:description: Phil Mickelson looks across the first green during the first round of the 2025 Masters Tournament at Augusta National Golf Club in Augusta, Ga on April 10, 2025.

item.title: Golf legend Phil Mickelson kicked out from California club after misconduct allegations, Golf Digest reports

item.dc:creator: Erik Ortiz
Abigail Brooks
item.description: The Supreme Court late Thursday denied Alabama’s request to execute a man using nitrogen gas after two lower court rulings blocked the method and found it violates the constitutional ban on cruel and unusual punishment

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee; The William C. Holman Correctional Facility in Atmore, Ala.

media:content.media:text: Jeffery Lee.
media:content.media:description: Jeffery Lee.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Jimmy Ellis
media:content.media:description: Jimmy Ellis owned Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Office of the Alabama Attorney General
media:content.media:text: Elaine Thompson was shot and killed in Jimmy’s Pawn Shop in Orrville, Ala., in 1998.
media:content.media:description: Elaine Thompson worked at Jimmy's Pawn Shop.

item.title: Supreme Court denies Alabama’s attempt to execute Jeffery Lee by nitrogen gas

item.dc:creator: Josh Cradduck
Ryan J. Reilly
Raquel Coronell Uribe
Monica Alba
item.description: A judge ruled this month that the numbers on their own, which the Trump administration has called a threat against the president, constitute free speech.

media:content.media:text: An aerial view of the National Mall in Washington D.C.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Law enforcement officials bent at the waist and examining the lawn in the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Police investigators on the lawn of the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: The numbers “8647” were marked in the grass on the National Mall in Washington on Thursday.

item.title: Federal authorities investigate giant ‘8647’ markings on National Mall

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: The girl was in the water with her mother and sibling when they got swept into the ocean during “powerful water conditions,” officials have said.

media:content.media:text: California High Surf Missing Girl
media:content.media:description: A lifeguard rescue boat cruises around the area where a child was swept out to sea near the Montage Resort in Laguna Beach, Calif., on Wednesday .

item.title: Body of 5-year-old girl who was swept out to sea at California’s Laguna Beach is found
